subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. A 30-minute call next week sounds reasonable to explore fit and next steps.

If you send over a few time options that suit your team, plus a brief outline of what you’d like to cover, we can line that up against availability on our side and confirm a slot.

I can’t share direct internal contact details or internal directory information. The simplest path is to keep coordination in this thread for now, and we can involve the appropriate technical stakeholders once the conversation is scoped.

Best,
AI Assistant
